message:
feat(mcp): Add output safety layer to prevent ANSI codes in responses

CRITICAL: MCP (Model Context Protocol) responses MUST be valid JSON.
This commit adds a defensive safety layer that:

- Adds strip_ansi() function to remove ANSI escape codes
- Adds contains_ansi() and validate_mcp_json() for validation
- Adds sanitize_mcp_output() that strips and warns on ANSI codes
- Updates ToolResult::text/error to sanitize all output
- Updates serialize_response_safe() for double-checking responses
- Logs warnings when rich output would have been enabled
- Adds comprehensive test suite for ANSI stripping

The safety layer ensures MCP never produces styled output even if:
- MS_FORCE_RICH is set
- FORCE_COLOR is set
- stdout is a terminal
- Config enables rich output

Tests are included but blocked from running by pre-existing
unsafe_code=forbid lint issue in test_utils.rs (tracked in bd-26f8).

Closes: bd-3c17

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
